raw_consumer_statement: Around to XXXX I received a text saying that a purchase couldn't go through then I checked my account and I noticed 2 or 3 charges ( not sure how much ) for about XXXX then I called to dispute it. They took care of it and sent me a new CC well I never activated that CC and I checked my email today with a XXXX dollars total charge of XXXX different transactions... I called and they said they will investigate but meanwhile I need to make the minimum payment.. I'm not making a payment since they clearly said that my XXXX has been compromised.. I need help please it Citi bank
